title: Fox Refreshed:FA
description: Fresh animations version of fox refreshed
body:
This is a [Fresh animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) version of [Fox refreshed](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fox-refreshed)

This resource pack revamps the look of foxes to make them cuter, more detailed, and full of personality—all while staying true to the game's blocky charm.

**This pack features:**

**Enhanced Fox Textures**: detailed designs that elevate the look of foxes while staying true to the vanilla aesthetic.

**Compatibility with Fresh Animations:** Seamlessly integrates with the popular Fresh Animations pack for a cohesive and lively experience.

**This pack requires [entity-texture-features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) and [entity-model-features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)!**
![emf,etf required!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4fc9806c2536bff8f6d0f67468bf4a5bfd6940de.png)
